head.message: [STRIKE] Normalize provenance paths to repo-relative in benchmark reports

phase0_blocker_fix.issue: STRIKE benchmark report provenance paths were absolute when reports were rendered outside the original checkout root.
phase0_blocker_fix.fix: Benchmark report path formatting now normalizes paths relative to configured/current roots and stable project anchors without hard-coding D:/Project/HexHawk.

build.frontend: passed with existing Vite chunk/import warnings

payload_compare.WebView2Loader.dll: MSI and NSIS hashes matched; NSIS contains the real 160 KB DLL, not an EXE payload
payload_compare.hexhawk-backend.exe: MSI and NSIS GUI executables differ because Tauri patches bundle type metadata per installer, and both launched successfully

msi_gui.title: HexHawk
msi_gui.vision_result: HexHawk onboarding UI rendered; no visible crash or error dialog.

nsis_gui.title: HexHawk
nsis_gui.vision_result: HexHawk onboarding UI rendered; no visible crash or error dialog.

limits: Artifacts are unsigned; this is not a signed release candidate.
Hosted updater metadata was not regenerated or published for this candidate.
Native GUI smoke proved launch/rendering, not full Open -> Inspect -> NEST -> Export parity for these exact artifacts.
Release worktree has generated build dirt and should be treated as evidence/build output, not source custody.
